title: Slenderman reimagined
description: This is sort of a recreation of the original Slenderman mod made by "Colossali" back in 2013 that was abandoned and discontinued. It was never finished so i am finishing what Colossali started, adding new features and a proper completion to it
body:
This is a pre-pre-pre-pre-pre alpha Slenderman recreation/reimagined mod of another mod from 2013 made by "Colossali" that was unfortunately discontinued however while it was still active. It brought in a bunch of attention and was featured in videos made by classic popular Youtubers such as DanTDM, SkyDoesMinecraft(A.K.A Everything), PopularMMOs, etc. It died out quickly after the downfall of the Slenderman creepypasta which might have grabbed the attention of "Colossali" to stop updating it. The original mod download page is now deleted however you can use Internet Archive to find a few workign downloads. I have archived them in a mod on Curseforge by the name Slenderstalgia for those who feel nostalgic to the mod. Here is the link to my archived mod: [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-original-slenderman-mod-working](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-original-slenderman-mod-working) anyways since the original mod was never finished, i have taken up on myself to continue its legacy and adding planned addtional features to the mod and also updating it to 1.20.1. I am one of the people who feel nostalgic to this mod so i am happy to continue its legacy and updating it to the current versions

The question is. What does this mod do? It adds Slenderman currently having Enderman behavior. Slenderman can do the following: Teleportion, place/destroy blocks, He can make ustom noises when hurt or death. Thats pretty much it. You got to keep in mind that this is a pre-pre-pre-pre-pre alpha mod and is nowhere close to finish. 

If you want me to finish it faster then consider helping if you know a whole bunch of Mcreator modding. I would appreciate some help and of course you will be credited for your work. I am more of a modeller guy at the moment then a programmer so i am nowhere close to understand full modding.
If this mod was your childhood and want to remaster it then consider contacting me on Modrinth or CurseForge. I am more then willing to welcome you in the development.
Right now i am not that scared of people ruining my mod since i have barely done anything with it other then small changes.
